trending_themes.evidence: Debuted March 24, 2025; released second EP 'Delulu Pack' January 26, 2026 with title track '404 (New Era)'; won K-POP Girl Group at NYLON NEXT 2026 Awards January 28.

trending_themes.theme: HEAD IN THE CLOUDS Tokyo — sole K-pop girl group at 88rising event
trending_themes.evidence: Performed March 28, 2026 at 88rising's hip-hop-focused festival in Tokyo — validates crossover appeal beyond K-pop circuit.
Held May 16-17, 2026 — marks early-stage fandom monetization and community building within 14 months of debut.

notable_movements: NYLON award within 10 months of debut

annotation_hooks: KiiiKiii represents post-HYBE era where Starship can compete for cultural relevance; NYLON award within 10 months reflects accelerated K-pop industry timeline
88rising connection positions them in trendy cosmopolitan hip-hop-adjacent space, differentiating from BP/NewJeans/TWICE legacy groups
'Uncut gem' concept (authenticity over polish) directly contrasts with NewJeans' curated newtro — two competing visions of what K-pop 'rawness' looks like in 2025
raw_headlines: KiiiKiii Sole K-pop Girl Group at HEAD IN THE CLOUDS Tokyo 2026
